title: hypericum petiolulatum subsp. petiolulatum
intro: Hypericum petiolulatum subsp. petiolulatum, also known as the mountain St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family, Hypericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum petiolulatum subsp. petiolulatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve anxiety and depression, and even treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support mental health, skin health, and immune function.
